title: West Virginia (NADE Chapter #59) — No Constitution & Bylaws on File (Note)
description: A short placeholder note, not a governing document. It records that West Virginia has a designated NADE chapter number (#59) but that, per the NADE National Constitution & Bylaws Chairperson, there are no constitution and bylaws on file (in paper or other form) for this chapter, though the chapter does contain a few members at this time. Signed by Donnie Hayes, NADE National Constitution & Bylaws Chairperson (9/09 to 9/10).

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — West Virginia Chapter (#59)
source.title: West Virginia (Chapter #59) — note: no Constitution & Bylaws on file

notes: Structurally unavailable: despite the filename pattern this file is NOT a constitution/bylaws document — it is a stub note (markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source document West-Virginia-No-Const-Bylaws.doc) created during NADE's transition to electronic chapter documents. The NADE National Constitution & Bylaws Chairperson confirms no constitution & bylaws exist on file for the West Virginia chapter (#59), which has a few members at this time, so there is no governing document to card as Authoritative. This is the statewide West Virginia (#59) chapter note; a separate Clarksburg West Virginia (CWVADE) chapter in this directory DOES have by-laws. temporal_coverage reflects the signer's stated chair term (9/09 to 9/10). Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
